{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Ombú Award
|class_id=20983
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Golden Ombú Award is the highest honor of the Festival Internacional de Cine de Mar del Plata and a major celebration of Latin American and European cinema. Originally non-competitive, the award was established to showcase Latin American culture through film, encourage filmmakers to speak openly, and support Argentine cinema through dedicated institutional backing.
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=18
|tech=15
|ss1=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +1%
|ss2=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +2%
|ss3=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +3%
|ss4=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +3%
|ss7=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
